channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Speaker Johnson says Republicans will act swiftly on election legislation
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson stated Sunday that Republicans will move quickly to advance President Donald Trump's key election bill through Congress.

item.title: Obama's influence looms over the 2028 Democratic primary race
item.description: Former President Barack Obama remains the most popular figure in the Democratic Party, and despite a lower public profile, his shadow still looms large.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: How Trump's quiet, direct leverage secured freedom for a persecuted Chinese pastor
Former Texas Representative William Archer Jr. dies at 98
item.description: Former Texas Republican Representative William Archer Jr. passed away on Saturday, July 4, at age 98. Before Congress, he served as a U.S. Army captain.
